# Template: Team Lead Work Plan

**Agent:** team-lead
**Creates:** `plan.md`
**Location:** `.github/work/current/<feature-name>/plan.md`

---

```markdown
# Work Plan: <Feature/Bug Name>

## Overview

**Type:** <feature | bug | enhancement | refactor>
**Priority:** <critical | high | medium | low>
**Source:** <GitHub Issue link or description>

## Requirements

<Clear statement of what needs to be accomplished>

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] <criterion that must be met>
- [ ] <criterion that must be met>
- [ ] <criterion that must be met>

## Scope

**In scope:**
- <item>
- <item>

**Out of scope:**
- <item>
- <item>

## Tasks

### 1. <Task Title> - @<agent-name>

- [ ] <subtask>
- [ ] <subtask>

### 2. <Task Title> - @<agent-name>

- [ ] <subtask>
- [ ] <subtask>

### 3. <Task Title> - @<agent-name>

- [ ] <subtask>
- [ ] <subtask>

## Dependencies

| Task | Depends On | Status |
|------|------------|--------|
| <task> | <prerequisite> | <pending/ready/complete> |

## Blockers

- [ ] <blocker description> - Status: <investigating/resolved>

## Timeline

| Milestone | Target |
|-----------|--------|
| Planning complete | <date or "now"> |
| Implementation complete | <estimate> |
| Review complete | <estimate> |

## Notes

<additional context, constraints, or considerations>
```
